game_logic_match_rate: 100% (6/6 fields: stage, boss, powerup, boss_flag, gameplay, gameplay_active)
root_cause: Boot timing offset: remake enters STATE_PLAYING with different section_timer than OG, causing room/SCX/enemy divergence cascade
findings: Core game logic is 100% correct across all 6 game-logic fields
Room system matches (5→3 transition) but timing offset shifts initial room
Form toggle works correctly but SELECT timing sensitivity causes divergence
Lives diverge because different room → different enemy encounters → different score → different extra lives
SCY impulse model works but is frame-timing sensitive
DQN and PPO both collapse to single action with MlpPolicy — needs CnnPolicy
next_steps: CnnPolicy for image-based RL (instead of flattened pixel MlpPolicy)
Curiosity-driven exploration (ICM/RND) for diverse state coverage
